---
title: "Active Research Projects"
image: profile.jpg
---

::: callout-important
## Fall 2025: We're for all of these projects. [Find out more](collaborate.qmd)
:::

#### Liberatory AI Think Tank

Founded by Nikko Stevens and [Catherine D'Ignazio](https://dusp.mit.edu/people/catherine-dignazio) (MIT), the Liberatory AI Think Tank is a collective of over 40 researchers studying ways of making with and about AI outside of corporate capture.

#### Carceral Technology History

We are producing a deeply researched inventory of key forms of carceral technology developed in the United States over the last 70 years

#### Restorative and Transformative Data Science: Case Studies

Through interviews with local activists and policy makers, we are studying the possibilities of activist data science in local municipalities
